subject: Re: Guermantes and Angliski
body:
the chateu woulod be better next friday...st petersburg the following week.. i plan to fly on wed or thurs as planned.... 

----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, November 23, 2006 1:07:28 AM
Subject: Guermantes and Angliski


Hi Jeffrey,



I met yesterday with all the legal team for Guermantes, and it went very well. We can visit the Chateau Tuesday, Wesnesday or Thursday morning. Anglinski, in Saint Petersburg we can visit any day of next week. Please let me know how to plan.J.P.
